column1: # Sudanese Arabic (apd) book names and abbreviations for biblelib
#   OT: adapted from Van Dyck Bible (Smith-Van Dyck, 1865) — no complete Sudanese Arabic OT exists
#   NT: adapted from Biblica Sudanese Arabic New Testament
# Note: Sudanese Arabic dialectal differences (e.g. /q/→/g/) are phonological, not orthographic;
#   written book names are identical to Standard Arabic forms.
# Note: NT names from Biblica have not been independently verified against the printed text;
#   review against the Biblica Sudanese Arabic NT is recommended before production use.
# Abbreviations: same as arb; no published Sudanese Arabic standard exists
# Deuterocanonical names from Arabic Catholic tradition (Dar al-Mashreq / Jesuit Bible)
